names.japanese_name: L-アスコルビン酸ナトリウム

natural_occurrence.description: Synthetically produced sodium salt of L-ascorbic acid (Vitamin C). The ascorbic acid portion is identical to naturally occurring vitamin C found in citrus fruits, strawberries, kiwi, bell peppers, broccoli, and tomatoes.

manufacturing.description: Produced by dissolving ascorbic acid in water with addition of sodium bicarbonate. After the reaction is complete and foaming stops, the compound is precipitated with isopropanol, yielding a white or slightly yellowish powder.

other_uses.pharmaceutical: Vitamin C supplement (gentler, less acidic form)

eu.conditions: Re-evaluated together with E300 and E302 in 2015 EFSA opinion

usa.notes: Approved for use in food as antioxidant and nutrient

japan.japanese_regulation_name: L-アスコルビン酸ナトリウム

regulatory_history.event: EFSA re-evaluation confirms no health risks at normal intake levels

commonly_found_in: Cured meats (bacon, ham, pepperoni, sausage, salami, prosciutto)

adi_context.source_note: No ADI necessary - EFSA and JECFA concluded no health risks at normal intake levels. Sodium ascorbate is a form of Vitamin C, an essential nutrient.

fun_facts.title: Color Preservation Hero
fun_facts.description: In cured meats, sodium ascorbate preserves the appealing purple-red hue by preventing oxidation of myoglobin, keeping products looking fresh longer.

fun_facts.title: Curing Accelerator
fun_facts.description: Acts as a curing accelerator that speeds up conversion of nitrite to nitric oxide, ensuring faster and more uniform color development in processed meats.

fun_facts.title: Nitrosamine Fighter
fun_facts.description: Significantly reduces formation of nitrosamines (potentially harmful compounds that can form from nitrite under high heat) in cured meats.

fun_facts.title: Dual Function
fun_facts.description: Serves both as an antioxidant to prevent rancidity AND as a nutritional fortification agent providing vitamin C.

fun_facts.title: Less Acidic Alternative
fun_facts.description: More pH-neutral than pure ascorbic acid, making it gentler on stomach and suitable for people who find regular vitamin C supplements too acidic.
